% Raw LaTeX header for the typeset PDF (included verbatim, not via Markdown).
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{booktabs}
% Map Unicode glyphs the body serif (Palatino) lacks to math equivalents.
\usepackage{newunicodechar}
\newunicodechar{→}{\ensuremath{\rightarrow}}
% Screenshots: scale to text width, never distort.
\setkeys{Gin}{width=\linewidth,keepaspectratio}
% Pin figures where they are placed in the source (no floating).
\usepackage{float}
\floatplacement{figure}{H}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[L]{\nouppercase{\leftmark}}
\fancyhead[R]{\thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\fancypagestyle{plain}{%
  \fancyhf{}%
  \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}%
  \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}%
}
